rag_rules: Place output range guarantees in component type annexes using visible output features and concrete bounds from the requirement.
Use eq helpers to define boolean range conditions before referencing them in guarantees.
generic_rules: Guarantees must reference only visible AADL features or locally declared eq/const variables.
Contract expressions must use AGREE scalar types: int, real, bool — never AADL property names or unit tokens.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use annex agree {** ... **}; for component type contracts.
Declare constants and equations before guarantees that depend on them.
anti_patterns: Do not use AADL property names (e.g., Period, Deadline) as AGREE variables.
Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scopes.
